hooks.command: dirs=$(find . -maxdepth 1 -mindepth 1 -type d -exec test -e '{}/.git' ';' -print | sort | sed 's|^\./||'); if [ -n "$dirs" ] && [ ! -e .git ]; then list=$(echo "$dirs" | paste -sd ', ' -); echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"SessionStart\",\"additionalContext\":\"This directory contains multiple projects: $list. Ask the user which project directory to use as the working directory for this session. Once they choose, cd into it for all subsequent work.\"}}"; fi
